Thanks for contributing! This is a personal tool that's open to contributions —
bug fixes, focused features (issue-first), docs, and tests are all welcome. See
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for what's in and out of scope.

**What this does**

<!-- A sentence or two. Link the issue you opened for anything non-trivial. -->

Fixes #

**Checklist**

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (`node --test`)
- [ ] A regression test ships with any bug fix
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or: a linked issue/discussion approving one)
- [ ] No unexplained changes to `.github/workflows/` or `package-lock.json`
- [ ] If this touches security-sensitive code (loopback bind / token gate,
      `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` deletion, `execFile` subprocess spawning, repo-path
      validation, or output escaping), I've flagged it above — see
      [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)
